export const getCategoryColor = cat => {
  const map = {
    Phones: 'primary',
    Laptops: 'success',
    Gadgets: 'warning',
    Accessories: 'info'
  };
  return map[cat] || 'secondary';
};

export const categories = ['All', 'Phones', 'Laptops', 'Gadgets', 'Accessories'];

export const getCategoryColor = (cat) => {
  const map = { Phones: 'primary', Laptops: 'success', Gadgets: 'warning', Accessories: 'info' };
  return map[cat] || 'secondary';
};
